summary: Comprehensive testing of Password Reset and Profile Management features completed. All backend APIs working (100% - 15/15 tests). All frontend UI flows working correctly: forgot password modal, reset password page, profile page with change password, delete account with DELETE confirmation, Google users correctly don't see change password section.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - sends reset email for existing user - PASS
POST /api/auth/forgot-password - returns success for non-existent user (prevents enumeration) - PASS
POST /api/auth/forgot-password - rejects invalid email format - PASS
POST /api/auth/reset-password - rejects invalid token - PASS
POST /api/auth/reset-password - validates password length - PASS
POST /api/auth/change-password - successfully changes password - PASS
POST /api/auth/change-password - rejects wrong current password - PASS
POST /api/auth/change-password - validates new password length - PASS
POST /api/auth/change-password - requires authentication - PASS
PUT /api/auth/profile - updates user name - PASS
PUT /api/auth/profile - rejects empty name - PASS
PUT /api/auth/profile - requires authentication - PASS
DELETE /api/auth/account - deletes user account - PASS
DELETE /api/auth/account - requires authentication - PASS
GET /api/auth/me - returns user with auth_provider field - PASS
Forgot password link in login modal opens forgot password modal - PASS
Forgot password form submits and shows 'Check Your Email' success - PASS
Back to Sign In button returns to login modal - PASS
Reset password page shows 'Invalid Reset Link' without token - PASS
Reset password page shows form with token - PASS
Reset password form validates password match - PASS
Profile page shows user info (email, name) - PASS
Profile page shows 'Account type: Email & Password' for email users - PASS
Change Password section visible for email/password users - PASS
Change Password form works and shows success toast - PASS
Delete Account button shows confirmation dialog - PASS
DELETE confirmation input enables Permanently Delete button - PASS
Profile page shows 'Account type: Google Account' for Google users - PASS
Change Password section HIDDEN for Google users - PASS
User menu shows 'My Profile' link - PASS

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all password reset and profile features working)

seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing. Google test user created and cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password Reset and Profile Management features fully tested and working. New endpoints: POST /api/auth/forgot-password (request reset email), POST /api/auth/reset-password (reset with token), POST /api/auth/change-password (change password for logged-in users), PUT /api/auth/profile (update name), DELETE /api/auth/account (delete account). Password reset tokens stored in 'password_resets' collection with 1-hour expiry. Reset link format: /reset-password?token=xxx. Profile page at /profile shows different UI for email/password users vs Google OAuth users - Change Password section hidden for Google users. Delete account requires typing 'DELETE' to confirm.
